commentary: Thirteen activities this week against nine last week, and honestly the audacity of it — you just kept going back, kept adding sessions, kept showing up like someone who has fully decided this is who he is now. The swimming volume is consistent and the pool heart rates are climbing in a way that says you are working, not just turning up, though that Sunday morning swim at 149 is doing something interesting at the top end worth watching. The long run dropped slightly from 13.7 to 13.1 kilometres and your heart rate came down from 159 to 151, which is either better fitness carrying you further for less effort or a slightly easier effort — either way, your legs are not the problem here. What I love most is the sheer density of it: doubles on Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Friday, and Sunday, weight sessions stacked on swim sessions stacked on runs, all of it adding up to a week that has absolutely no chill and every reason to be proud of itself.
